title: Intense Herbal Spanish Chickpea Tagine
description: A quick and flavorful Spanish dish featuring chickpeas and ras el hanout, with a rich and herbal taste, made in a kadhai and tempered with chocolate for a deep flavor.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a kadhai over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the ras el hanout and cook for 1 minute, until the spices are fragrant.
Add the chickpeas, tomato paste, vegetable broth, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 20 minutes, until the flavors have melded together and the chickpeas are tender.
Melt the dark chocolate in a double boiler or in the microwave in 30 second increments, stirring between each interval.
Temper the chocolate by stirring it into the chickpea mixture and cooking for an additional 2 minutes, until the chocolate is fully incorporated and the mixture is hot and bubbly.
Serve the tagine hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
